title: Brunson Dependency Index
lede: Evaluating the Knicks' upcoming fixtures to identify where a high-scoring performance from Jalen Brunson is most critical.

sections.title: Upcoming Fixtures Pressure Ranking
sections.description: Upcoming games ranked by how heavily the Knicks rely on Brunson's scoring, factoring in opponent and venue.

sections.title: Knicks Win Rate by Brunson Points
sections.description: Historical win percentage based on Brunson's scoring output to provide context for the pressure index behaviour.

sections.title: Model Inputs
sections.description: Variables used to categorise and organise fixture pressure levels.
items: Brunson's scoring average over the last 10 games
Historical Knicks win likelihood at specific scoring bands
Opponent defensive rating and recent performance

demoSteps: Load the dashboard using local JSON fixtures to ensure deterministic behaviour.
Review the top highlights to instantly see the most critical upcoming game.
Examine the 'Upcoming Fixtures Pressure Ranking' table to see the next three games and their associated burden.
Check the win rate series to understand the transparent logic behind the pressure levels.
notes: Ensure all text strictly uses UK spelling.
Keep the visual design minimal; avoid any sports betting aesthetic.
If live data is introduced later, the application must gracefully fall back to these static fixtures if an API fails.
